H6001.strongs_def: toiling; concretely, a laborer; figuratively, sorrowful
H6001.kjv_def: that laboureth, that is a misery, had taken (labour), wicked, workman.

H6002.strongs_def: Amalek, a descendant of Esau; also his posterity and their country

H6003.strongs_def: an Amalekite (or collectively the Amalekites) or descendants of Amalek

H6004.strongs_def: to associate; by implication, to overshadow (by huddling together)

H6005.derivation: from H5973 (עִם) and with a pronominal suffix inserted; with us (is) God;
H6005.strongs_def: Immanuel, a type name of Isaiah's son

H6006.strongs_def: to load, i.e. impose aburden (or figuratively, infliction)
H6006.kjv_def: be borne, (heavy) burden (self), lade, load, put.

H6007.derivation: from H6006 (עָמַס) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has loaded;

H6008.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H5703 (עַד); people of time;

H6009.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make) deep (literally or figuratively)
H6009.kjv_def: (be, have, make, seek) deep(-ly), depth, be profound.

H6010.kjv_def: dale, vale, valley (often used as a part of proper names). See also H1025 (בֵּית הָעֵמֶק).

H6014.derivation: a primitive root; properly, apparently to heap; figuratively, to chastise (as if piling blows); specifically (as denominative from H6016 (עֹמֶר))

H6016.strongs_def: properly, a heap, i.e. a sheaf; also an omer, as a dry measure

H6019.derivation: probably from H5971 (עַם) and H7311 (רוּם); high people;
H6019.strongs_def: Amram, the name of two Israelites

H6020.strongs_def: an Amramite or descendant of Amram

H6021.strongs_def: Amasa, the name of two Israelites

H6022.strongs_def: Amasai, the name of three Israelites

H6024.derivation: from the same as H6025 (עֵנָב); fruit;

H6025.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to bear fruit;

H6026.strongs_def: to be soft or pliable, i.e. (figuratively) effeminate or luxurious

H6030.strongs_def: properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce
H6030.kjv_def: give account, afflict (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, [idiom] scholar, (give a) shout, sing (together by course), speak, testify, utter, (bear) witness. See also H1042 (בֵּית עֲנוֹת), H1043 (בֵּית עֲנָת).
H6030.usage: answer(242x), hear(42x), testify(12x), speak(8x), sing(4x), bear(3x), cry(2x), witness(2x), give(1x)

H6031.derivation: a primitive root (possibly rather identical with H6030 (עָנָה) through the idea of looking down or browbeating);
H6031.strongs_def: to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows)
H6031.kjv_def: abase self, afflict(-ion, self), answer (by mistake for H6030 (עָנָה)), chasten self, deal hardly with, defile, exercise, force, gentleness, humble (self), hurt, ravish, sing (by mistake for H6030 (עָנָה)), speak (by mistake for H6030 (עָנָה)), submit self, weaken, [idiom] in any wise.
H6031.usage: afflict(50x), humble(11x), force(5x), exercised(2x), sing(2x), Leannoth(1x), troubled(1x), weakened(1x)

H6032.strongs_def: {properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce}

H6033.strongs_def: {to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows)}

H6034.strongs_def: Anah, the name of two Edomites and one Edomitess
H6034.pos: proper feminine noun, proper masculine noun

H6035.derivation: or (by intermixture with H6041 (עָנִי)) עָנָיו; from H6031 (עָנָה);
H6035.strongs_def: depressed (figuratively), in mind (gentle) or circumstances (needy, especially saintly)
H6035.kjv_def: humble, lowly, meek, poor. Compare H6041 (עָנִי).

H6036.derivation: passive participle from the same as H6025 (עֵנָב); borne (as fruit);

H6038.strongs_def: condescension, human and subjective (modesty), or divine and objective (clemency)

H6041.derivation: from H6031 (עָנָה); (practically the same as H6035 (עָנָו), although the margin constantly disputes this, making H6035 (עָנָו) subjective and objective);

H6042.strongs_def: Unni, the name of two Israelites

H6043.strongs_def: Anajah, the name of two Israelites

H6045.strongs_def: ado, i.e. (generally) employment or (specifically) an affair

H6046.derivation: from the dual of H5869 (עַיִן); two fountains;

H6047.derivation: as if plural of some Egyptian word;
H6047.strongs_def: Anamim, a son of Mizraim and his descendants, with their country

H6049.derivation: a primitive root; to cover; used only as a denominative from H6051 (עָנָן), to cloud over;
H6049.strongs_def: figuratively, to act covertly, i.e. practise magic
H6049.kjv_def: [idiom] bring, enchanter, Meonemin, observe(-r of) times, soothsayer, sorcerer.

H6050.strongs_def: {a cloud (as covering the sky), i.e. the nimbus or thunder-cloud}

H6051.strongs_def: a cloud (as covering the sky), i.e. the nimbus or thunder-cloud

H6055.derivation: from H6049 (עָנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has covered;
H6055.strongs_def: Ananjah, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine
H6055.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H6057.derivation: from an unused root meaning to cover;

H6059.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to choke; used only as denominative from H6060 (עָנָק),
H6059.strongs_def: to collar, i.e. adorn with anecklace; figuratively, to fit out with supplies
H6059.kjv_def: compass about as a chain, furnish, liberally.

H6062.strongs_def: an Anakite or descendant of Anak

H6063.strongs_def: Aner, a Amorite, also a place in Palestine
H6063.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H6064.strongs_def: properly, to urge; by implication, to inflict apenalty, specifically, to fine

H6068.strongs_def: Anathoth, the name of two Israelites, also of a place in Pal
H6068.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H6069.strongs_def: a Antothite or inhabitant of Anathoth

H6070.derivation: from the same as H6068 (עֲנָתוֹת) and H3050 (יָהּ); answers of Jah;

H6071.strongs_def: must or fresh grape-juice (as just trodden out)

H6072.strongs_def: to squeeze out juice; figuratively, to trample

H6073.derivation: from an unused root meaning to cover;

H6076.strongs_def: a tumor; also a mound, i.e. fortress

H6078.derivation: from an unused noun (denoting a place in Palestine; from an unused root of uncertain meaning);
H6078.strongs_def: an Ophnite (collectively) or inhabitants of Ophen

H6079.strongs_def: an eyelash (as fluttering); figuratively, morning ray

H6080.derivation: ; a primitive root; meaning either to be gray or perhaps rather to pulverize; used only as denominative from H6083 (עָפָר),

H6081.derivation: probably a variation of H6082 (עֹפֶר); gazelle;
H6081.strongs_def: Epher, the name of an Arabian and of two Israelites

H6083.strongs_def: dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud
H6083.kjv_def: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish.
H6083.usage: dust(93x), earth(7x), powder(3x), rubbish(2x), ashes(2x), morter(2x), ground(1x)

H6084.strongs_def: Ophrah, the name of an Israelite and of two places in Palestine
H6084.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H6085.derivation: from the same as H6081 (עֵפֶר); fawn-like;
H6085.strongs_def: Ephron, the name of a Canaanite and of two places in Palestine
H6085.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H6086.strongs_def: a tree (from its firmness); hence, wood (plural sticks)
H6086.kjv_def: [phrase] carpenter, gallows, helve, [phrase] pine, plank, staff, stalk, stick, stock, timber, tree, wood.
H6086.usage: tree(162x), wood(107x), timber(23x), stick(14x), gallows(8x), staff(4x), stock(4x), branches(1x), helve(1x), planks(1x), stalks(1x)

H6087.strongs_def: properly, to carve, i.e. fabricate or fashion; hence (in a bad sense) to worry, pain or anger
H6087.kjv_def: displease, grieve, hurt, make, be sorry, vex, worship, wrest.
H6087.usage: grieve(10x), displeased(1x), hurt(1x), made(1x), sorry(1x), vexed(1x), worship(1x), wrest(1x)

H6089.strongs_def: an earthen vessel; usually (painful) toil; also a pang (whether of body or mind)

H6090.strongs_def: an idol (as fashioned); also pain (bodily or mental)

H6094.strongs_def: a idol; also, a pain or wound

H6095.strongs_def: properly, to fasten (or make firm), i.e. to close (the eyes)

H6096.strongs_def: the spine (as giving firmness to the body)

H6098.strongs_def: advice; by implication, plan; also prudence

H6099.derivation: or עָצֻם; passive participle of H6105 (עָצַם);
H6099.strongs_def: powerful (specifically, a paw); by implication, numerous
H6099.usage: strong(13x), mighty(8x), mightier(7x), feeble(1x), great(1x), much(1x)
